nasb.text: Then on the seventh day they rose early at the dawning of the day and marched around the city in the same manner seven times; only on that day they marched around the city seven times.

esv.text: On the seventh day they rose early, at the dawn of day, and marched around the city in the same manner seven times. It was only on that day that they marched around the city seven times.

cnv.text: 到了第七日，清早黎明的時候，他們起來，以同樣的方式繞城七次；只有這一日，他們繞城七次。

ccb.text: 第七天黎明时分，他们起来照样绕城，只是这一天他们绕城走了七次。
